title: SettingsProfiles
description: Save and load profiles of your settings and mod configs.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1eac13d71d2b8b24f33beb552721fa3c82b67ac_0.webp)

![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39512642a186c515ce4b0eb09eb9e29a95c0d226.png)

![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9d1ca65b147d77a9332842b1c59d8d8eeb6bd9e.png)

![Logo 16x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd6838104a129dc0b7795a9c06aab4fadea27db1.png) **SettingsProfiles** lets you save and load profiles of your settings and mod config with one click.

Switch between your Recording, FPS, PvP, SMP, Building, or whatever profiles you need with **ease**.

**SettingsProfiles** will save your:
- FOV
- Skin Customisation
- Music & Sounds
- Video Settings
- Controls
- Language
- Chat Settings
- Accessibility Settings
- Mod Configs

![Screenshot1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/040adc016589c8078e381a8bfc6e997a2815e129.png)
![Screenshot2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e034b032682cf184239cf9e29a6715aeb94e852.png)


![Line No Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6130b758bc3bc758e86d4f79a63b440aa2614857.png)

![Installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df4e93da55456eebde90500cc439276de5d78662.png)

### Installation Steps:

- Install **[Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/)** for your chosen version.
- Install **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** for your chosen version.
- Install **SettingsProfiles** for your chosen version.
- Place both **`FabricAPI`** and **`SettingsProfiles`** in the **`mods`** folder of your Minecraft.
- **Launch Minecraft and enjoy. :)**

![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39512642a186c515ce4b0eb09eb9e29a95c0d226.png)
